jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Bitwarden is the trusted identity security leader for millions of users worldwide, empowering enterprises, developers, and individuals to securely manage and share sensitive information anywhere.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Backend Engineer partners with Engineering & Product to ship the credential-vault server-side pipelines that power Bitwarden's end-to-end-encrypted sync & share surfaces.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Bitwarden is the trusted identity security leader. The Sales team owns the B2B Bitwarden-for-Business pipeline.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Full Stack Software Engineer partners with Engineering and Sales to ship the customer-facing portal across enterprise cohorts.</p>
